summary.title: Summary
summary.content:
Computer Engineering student at the University of Delaware with hands-on experience in embedded systems, full-stack development, and control systems integration. Demonstrated initiative through end-to-end personal projects involving real-time data processing, cloud infrastructure, and signal-based sensing. Eager to apply analytical and engineering fundamentals to mission-level problems.


I'm a Computer Engineering student at the University of Delaware with a passion creating function solutions using software. Whether I'm developing signal-based monitoring systems, creating web applications, or tinkering with my own home server setups, I love tackling complex problems from the ground up. Beyond the screen and the breadboard, I thrive on staying active and creative. You'll often find me on the water sailing, hitting the slopes for some skiing, or jumping into a fast-paced game of pickleball. I'm also deeply passionate about music—whether I'm laying down a groove on the bass or singing in a choir. I believe the best engineering comes from a well-rounded perspective, and I bring that same collaborative energy and discipline to every project I take on.

items.description:
• Designed and deployed a FastAPI-based Python tool to automate JSON configuration editing for Ignition SCADA projects, reducing manual workflow time and eliminating a class of human error in config management
  • Built a custom Python library for programmatic manipulation of Ignition JSON data structures, enabling repeatable and testable configuration workflows across multiple projects
  • Developed interactive Python and Java interfaces within the Ignition platform to improve operator visibility and control over live industrial processes
  • Extended legacy control system projects by interpreting engineering drawings and technical documentation, validating outputs against original design specifications
  • Collaborated within a multidisciplinary engineering team to scope, implement, and deliver features against project management milestones

items.company: Johns Hopkins University, Department of Epidemiology
items.description:
• Developed JavaScript tooling for clinical trial data entry forms, improving data validation and reducing entry errors across active studies
  • Built a PHP program to convert and migrate a Microsoft Access database to a web-compatible structure, preserving referential integrity across thousands of records
  • Maintained and improved client-server architecture for web-based data collection forms used in ongoing epidemiological research
  • Worked iteratively with researchers and staff to incorporate user feedback into system improvements under real-world data integrity constraints

items.company: University of Delaware, Dept. of Electrical & Computer Engineering
items.position: Lab Assistant – Analog Circuits I & Digital Systems
items.description:
• Guided students hands-on through analog circuit construction, measurement, and debugging in weekly lab sections
  • Led a lab section on digital systems, mentoring students through VHDL design projects from specification to synthesis and simulation
  • Diagnosed and explained circuit and code failures, building student intuition for both hardware and HDL debugging

• Configured and operated ProPresenter software for live in-house displays and simultaneous online streaming
  • Shot and edited marketing and informational videos using DSLR cameras and Adobe Premiere Pro
  • Installed, configured, and maintained an indoor stage lighting system and various AV electronics

Highlights: Honors College, Computer Science Minor, Cybersecurity Minor, German for Engineers Program, IEEE Honor Society Tau Beta Pi

Courses: Probability & Statistics for Engineers, Signals & Systems, Digital Signal Processing, Numerical Methods, Embedded Systems, Computer Architecture, Control Systems, Digital Logic & VHDL, Cybersecurity Fundamentals

items.name: CradleWave Baby Monitor
items.description:
End-to-end IoT sensing system using 60 GHz millimeter-wave radar for non-contact infant monitoring

  • Designed a sensing pipeline using a 60 GHz FMCW radar module to detect infant presence, motion, and breathing rate without physical contact
  • Implemented signal processing on raw radar returns to extract breathing rate and movement metrics; evaluated detection performance against ground-truth observations across varying distance and orientation scenarios
  • Built a Python FastAPI backend to ingest real-time radar data, apply processing algorithms, and stream results to cloud storage via Google Firebase
  • Developed a Vue.js frontend and mobile-accessible web app for live monitoring dashboards and historical data review
  • Validated system robustness across multiple environmental conditions; characterized false-alarm rate and detection latency as key performance indicators

Keywords: Python, FastAPI, Vue.js, Firebase, 60GHz Radar, Signal Processing, IoT, Real-time Systems

items.name: Ignition JSON Automation Tool
items.description:
Python tooling for automating configuration workflows in Ignition SCADA environments

  • Built a FastAPI application exposing a REST interface for programmatic JSON editing of Ignition project configurations
  • Developed a reusable internal Python library abstracting common Ignition JSON data manipulation patterns
  • Reduced configuration turnaround time and introduced testability into previously manual processes

Keywords: Python, FastAPI, REST API, SCADA, Ignition, Automation

items.name: RemAIk – Full-Stack Browser Game
items.description:
Multiplayer browser-based game with AI-generated content and secure user authentication

  • Built a full-stack multiplayer game using Vue.js frontend and Google Firebase for real-time database and authentication
  • Designed a secure user-focused data model with role-based access controls and authenticated session management
  • Integrated an AI content generation pipeline to dynamically produce game prompts and assets

Keywords: Vue.js, Firebase, JavaScript, Full-Stack, Authentication

items.name: Arduino Shield Cloud Timer
items.description:
Custom Arduino shield with cloud-connected dashboard for timer monitoring and control

  • Designed a custom PCB Arduino shield integrating multiple external peripherals including display, input, and wireless modules
  • Wrote firmware to control and display a configurable timer with cloud telemetry via MQTT
  • Built a web dashboard to visualize live and historical timer data sent from the device to the cloud

Keywords: Arduino, Embedded Systems, PCB Design, IoT, Cloud, C++

items.title: Eagle Scout
items.description: Highest rank in Scouting. Served as Senior Patrol Leader, Philmont Crew Leader, and held multiple other leadership positions over 7 years. Planned annual programs and weekly meetings, leading groups of up to 70 scouts across campouts, high-adventure treks, and service projects.

items.title: Tau Beta Pi – IEEE Honor Society
items.description: Member of the engineering honor society recognizing academic excellence and commitment to the profession.

Lead a campus ministry community at the University of Delaware

  • Coordinated event planning with university administration for events of 50+ students
  • Grew a collaborative campus community through intentional relationship building and programming
